mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, charged_balance, reward_balance, locked_balance, created_at, updated_at FROM wallets WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, user_id, charged_balance, reward_balance, locked_balance, created_at, updated_at FROM wallets WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallets (user_id) VALUES (#{userId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING
